title: herminium bulleyi
intro: Herminium bulleyi, also known as the Bulley's orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is native to the Himalayan region and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant has been traditionally used to relieve coughs, fever, and other respiratory problems due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal preparations of Herminium bulleyi include infusions and decoctions made from its roots and leaves, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
